sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Qarabağ FK is in excellent form, having won 4 of their last 5 matches, showcasing strong attacking prowess with consistent scoring. Eintracht Frankfurt, on the other hand, has struggled, failing to secure a win in their last 4 games, with defensive vulnerabilities evident as they've conceded in each of those matches.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last two head-to-head encounters in 2013, Eintracht Frankfurt dominated Qarabağ FK, winning both matches (2-0 away and 2-1 at home). This historical edge might give Frankfurt a psychological boost despite their current poor form.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Qarabağ FK has scored 10 goals this season but struggles with ball possession (44.5%, 29th rank) and creating big chances (12, 27th rank). Eintracht Frankfurt, sitting at 33rd in the league with just 4 points, has conceded 16 goals, one of the worst defensive records, which could be exploited by Qarabağ's attack.

sections.subtitle: Key Insights
sections.text: Qarabağ's matches often see over 2.5 goals (7/7 recent games), and both teams tend to score in their games. Frankfurt's inability to keep clean sheets (4 consecutive games) combined with Qarabağ's home advantage in Baku and Sofascore's 55% home win prediction tilt the scales in favor of the hosts.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: The first half between Qarabağ FK and Eintracht Frankfurt ended in an entertaining 1-1 draw at Tofiq Bəhramov Stadium in Baku. Both teams scored early, with Qarabağ FK striking first through Camilo Duran in the 4th minute, only for Eintracht Frankfurt to respond quickly via Can Uzun in the 10th minute. The game has been competitive, with both sides showing intent to take control. Qarabağ FK dominated possession and created more clear opportunities, while Eintracht Frankfurt demonstrated efficiency with fewer chances. As we head into the second half, both teams have reasons to believe they can secure the win.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Qarabağ FK's first-half performance
halftimeSections.text: Qarabağ FK showcased their intent to control the game from the outset, maintaining a significant share of possession and frequently entering the final third. They created a couple of big chances, though they missed one key opportunity. Their attacking play was supported by numerous corner kicks and consistent penalty area entries, reflecting their determination to break through. Defensively, they struggled in duels, particularly in the air, which could be a concern against a physically strong Eintracht Frankfurt side. Players like Camilo Duran, who found the net early, and Elvin Jafarguliyev, who contributed creatively, stood out in their efforts to push the team forward.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Eintracht Frankfurt's first-half performance
halftimeSections.text: Eintracht Frankfurt took a more pragmatic approach in the first half, ceding possession but remaining dangerous on the counter. They capitalized on one of their limited opportunities, with Can Uzun delivering a clinical finish to level the score. Despite fewer entries into the penalty area, they were effective in winning duels, especially aerial battles, which allowed them to disrupt Qarabağ FK's rhythm at times. Their defensive structure held firm under pressure, and they showed resilience in regaining possession in key areas. Uzun’s performance was a highlight, as he proved to be a constant threat up front.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum analysis
halftimeSections.text: The first half saw distinct shifts in attacking momentum between the two sides. Qarabağ FK started strongly, dictating the early minutes with sustained attacking spells that led to their opening goal. After conceding, Eintracht Frankfurt responded with a notable surge, gaining momentum around the time of their equalizer and maintaining pressure for a significant period. Later in the half, Qarabağ FK regained control with several waves of attacks, pushing hard to re-establish their lead. Towards the closing stages, the home side continued to press, while Eintracht Frankfurt’s attacking threat waned, suggesting they may have been focusing on defensive stability.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second-half expectations
halftimeSections.text: Heading into the second half, Qarabağ FK will likely continue to leverage their possession-based approach to create more scoring opportunities. They’ll need to be more clinical in front of goal and shore up their defensive duels to prevent Eintracht Frankfurt from exploiting counter-attacks. Eintracht Frankfurt, on the other hand, will probably aim to capitalize on quick transitions, relying on their physicality and efficiency in front of goal. Fatigue could play a factor, especially for Qarabağ FK, given their high-intensity pressing in the first half. Tactical adjustments from either side could shift the balance, but the game remains finely poised for an exciting conclusion.
